name_en: 🌟🌟🌟CHANEL 22bag mini	It's so cool~ it's my favorite, just browsing... completely want to buy a bag, eye-catching, must grab it haha! The SA was very nice. Chanel patent calfskin paired with vintage hardware, quilted, the mini 22bag is more refined than the larger size. The chain design is so Coco, double chains ⛓➕ leather strap chains ⛓, full of details. Tighten and open the bag using the two short leather chains on the front, the two long shoulder straps on the back are purely for carrying.
